Geolocation.iosLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Fleet Apex uses location to show vehicle positions on the live map.
Geolocation.iosLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Fleet Apex uses location in the background for continuous fleet tracking.

Camera.iosCameraUsageDescription: Fleet Apex uses the camera to capture vehicle inspection photos.
Camera.iosPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Fleet Apex can attach existing photos to vehicle or driver records.
